title: 1. Migrate webpack projects
excerpt: description: Migrate webpack-based Workers projects from Wrangler v1 to v2 by ejecting your bundler configuration. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. This guide describes the steps to migrate a webpack project from Wrangler v1 to Wrangler v2\. After completing this guide, [update your Wrangler version](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/wrangler/migration/v1-to-v2/update-v1-to-v2/).…
